top_signals.title: Flesh-eating screwworm is confirmed in the U.S., officials say
top_signals.summary: The USDA and Texas officials are working to contain New World screwworm from Zavala County, including establishing an infested zone and enforcing quarantine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Security researcher finds Zcash vulnerability allowing ‘unlimited’ counterfeit minting; ZEC drops 31%
top_signals.summary: The vulnerability was fixed within days, and findings suggest that actual exploitation of the bug is unlikely.
